title: Highly sequenced copolymer for dual-tone photoresists, resist composition and patterning process thereof
abstract: A resin including a highly sequenced copolymer is presented, and the preparation and application of its resist composition is presented. The resist has excellent performance and can promote the development of integrated circuits.
claims: 1. An ordered photolithographic resin, wherein the photolithographic resin is a copolymer comprising structure 1 and structure 2,
